Create multi-post threads with full cont: Create multi-post threads with full control. Supports different content and media per post using JSON format.
A JSON array of post objects. Each post: A JSON array of post objects. Each post can have: text (string), platforms (array of strings), media_ids (array of strings). Example: [{"text": "First post"}, {"text": "Second post"}]
An optional title for the draft.

The ID of the draft to retrieve.
